div.head: 42. Memorandum for the RecordSource: National Security Council, Intelligence Files, NSC 5412/2 Special Group, Minutes and Agendas, 1960. Secret; Eyes Only.

list.head: SUBJECT
list.item: Minutes of Special Group Meeting, 10 November 1960

list.head: PRESENT
list.item: Messrs. Merchant, Douglas, Gray, Dulles, Bissell

div.p: [Omitted here is discussion of other subjects.]

Mr. Bissell mentioned briefly that we are making certain contingency plans for the Congo against the possibility of a pro-Soviet Lumumba government, or complications arising from a militant Katanga independence movement.
Mr. Scott, who had replaced Mr. Merchant in the meeting, said that the African Bureau of State agrees with CIA’s general method of proceeding with these plans.
